ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-24-2006 IN 206, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOITON FOR PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) AND (D) -PLAINTIFFS'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERNCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL AND EXTENDING DISCOCERY CUTOFF IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A), ONLY, CONDITIIONALLY THAT ALL DEPOSITIONS OF ALL CLAIMANTS NUST BE COMPLETED BY 11/30/06. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT APPLIES. THE PARTIES STIPULATE AS TO WAIVING THE TIME REQUIREMENTS PURSUANT TO CCP 437(A). PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 11/27/06, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECONOMIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. THIS MATTER IS SINGLY ASSIGNED TO JUDGE JOHN E. MUNTER IN DEPARTMENT 505 FOR ALL PURPOSES. THE PARTIES ARE TO NOTIFY DEPARTMENT 505 THAT THIS MATTER SHALL BE SET FOR TRIAL 120 DAYS OUT. PENDING WRITTEN ORDER. JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO; CLERK: R. GOULDING; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 (206)
